summary: Iteration 113: Global Immersion Level Toggle feature fully tested. All features working correctly - nav bar toggle with 3 levels (Calm/Standard/Full Immersive), Settings page Experience Level section, Vision Mode toggle in Bible chapter reader (only visible in Full Immersive mode), and Scripture Visualizer canvas activation.

success_rate.backend: 100% (Bible categories returns 7 categories with 136 total books)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Immersion Level Toggle feature fully implemented. Nav bar toggle (data-testid='immersion-toggle') opens dropdown panel (data-testid='immersion-panel') with 3 levels: Calm (data-testid='immersion-calm'), Standard (data-testid='immersion-standard'), Full Immersive (data-testid='immersion-full'). Settings page has Experience Level section (data-testid='immersion-level-picker') with buttons (data-testid='immersion-settings-calm/standard/full'). Vision Mode toggle (data-testid='vision-mode-toggle') only appears in Bible chapter reader when in Full Immersive mode. Scripture Visualizer canvas (data-testid='scripture-visualizer') activates when Vision Mode is on. Calm mode hides all visual effects including Vision Mode toggle. Prefs stored in localStorage key 'cosmic_prefs' with immersionLevel field.

nav_bar_immersion_toggle.full_selection: PASS - Selecting Full Immersive changes toggle to purple text
nav_bar_immersion_toggle.accessibility_warning: PASS - Epilepsy/photosensitive warning shown in panel
